name.ja: <ruby>報<rt>ほう</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt>どう</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt>かっ</rt></ruby><ruby>戦<rt>せん</rt></ruby>スクーピーズ［<ruby>Ｒ<rt>アール</rt></ruby>］

requirement.en: You have 10 or more cards in your Deck.

effect.en: Your opponent excavates the top card of their Deck and places it on top of their Deck. If it was a Monster Card, send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard. Then, if this card is in Maximum Mode, you can place up to 2 "Hot Off the Press" from your Graveyard on top of the Deck in any order.
